creator: wb7odyfred@yahoo.com
text:
Li-Wen Su thank you for your encouragement
I created  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D43399  with one patch file  vchiq_2835_arm.c.patch,  oops overwrite  bcm2835_audio.c.patch file.   Will study how to add all 6 other patch files that are in the attachments file tar.gz above  https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=245983
Fred

ps  will  Marcos Devesas Campos  HDMI Audio Files for Raspberry Pi 32 bits and 64 bits be integrated into FreeBSD source code base some day?  I see from the differential revision output for D43399, that Marcos code is not there.

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D36431   September 3, 2022  vchiq: update printf-s to more architecture-independent format specifiers

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D37878   December 26  2022  arm64: Add support to vchiq and bcm2835_audio (plus some fixes)
